title: The True Evangelions
wikitext:
[]: The True Evangelions (Spoilers...)             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Thu Sep 10, 2009 8:26 pm Eva Unit-01 becomes it's "True Form," just like in the original series, with 2.0 Neato. Now during the Seele discussion, they speak of Unit-06 being the first "True Evangelion." What exactly do you think this is foreshadowing? Are we likely to see the most epicly badass battle of the Evas EVER witnessed by man? True Eva vs. True Eva? This wouldn't surprise me, paralelling the fight between Unit-01 and Unit-02 in episode 24. Maybe this time, Kaworu will bring Shinji happiness the only way he knows how. By ending his life, instead of his own this time around (Yeah yeah, I know it's not an official EoE sequel yet, just speculating. Keep your pants on.... Or better yet- take them off. Relax a little).

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Sep 11, 2009 12:02 am True evangelion is a bit spoilerish for the title i think.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Sep 11, 2009 8:50 am "True Evangelion" came out in the poster for 2.0, so it's not a spoiler. Back to your regularly scheduled discussion.

[]: Re: The True Evangelions (Spoilers...)             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Sep 11, 2009 10:27 am DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Now during the Seele discussion, they speak of Unit-06 being the first "True Evangelion." What exactly do you think this is foreshadowing? Are we likely to see the most epicly badass battle of the Evas EVER witnessed by man? True Eva vs. True Eva? This wouldn't surprise me, paralelling the fight between Unit-01 and Unit-02 in episode 24.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Sep 11, 2009 2:45 pm I don't know what the hell a "true evangelion" is. One would think that they all true evangelions. Could someone explain this to me? Anyway... In the movie quote, it seems that Eva-01 is still ment to be the God, rather than Eva-06 or 08. Evas-06 and 08 are rather steps toward the final goal of the godly Eva. Maybe this time, Kaworu will bring Shinji happiness the only way he knows how. By ending his life, instead of his own this time around.

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Fri Sep 11, 2009 2:50 pm I wouldn't mind a hardcore true eva vs true eva match, if only to see how visually awesome they could make it.

[]: Re: The True Evangelions (Spoilers...)             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Fri Sep 11, 2009 3:20 pm SaltyJoe wrote: And Eva-08 from the 3.0 trailer looks... pretty godly. My guess that Eva-08 will result from some sort of merger/whatever of Lilith and Mark06, with Eva-01 having a role in the whole affair as well (maybe providing the core? The that has Rei, i.e Lilith's soul within it?).

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Fri Sep 11, 2009 5:22 pm Is there a possibility that Eva Unit-01 isn't the ONLY Eva born from Lilith in this version of the series? Thats my best guess, I suppose.

[]: Re: The True Evangelions (Spoilers...)             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Fri Sep 11, 2009 5:41 pm SaltyJoe wrote: DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Now during the Seele discussion, they speak of Unit-06 being the first "True Evangelion." What exactly do you think this is foreshadowing? Are we likely to see the most epicly badass battle of the Evas EVER witnessed by man? True Eva vs. True Eva? This wouldn't surprise me, paralelling the fight between Unit-01 and Unit-02 in episode 24.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Sep 11, 2009 9:23 pm roblucci01 wrote: Is there a possibility that Eva Unit-01 isn't the ONLY Eva born from Lilith in this version of the series? Thats my best guess, I suppose.

[]: Re: The True Evangelions (Spoilers...)             Quote Post by CATO » Fri Sep 11, 2009 10:11 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: they speak of Unit-06 being the first "True Evangelion." What exactly do you think this is foreshadowing?

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Sep 11, 2009 10:21 pm Im thinking bout the super powers.........And two cores......S2 Engine......WAIT....Did Unit 01 get a S2 engine in 2.0 or does the second core count as one?

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Fri Sep 11, 2009 10:54 pm wonderluster wrote: Im thinking bout the super powers.........And two cores......S2 Engine......WAIT....Did Unit 01 get a S2 engine in 2.0 or does the second core count as one?

[]: Re: The True Evangelions (Spoilers...)             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Sep 12, 2009 4:30 am Electric Sachiel wrote: Hold on. Eva Unit 08 was shown in the Quickening trailer? Since when?

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Sep 12, 2009 4:32 pm Thanks for the uploads, and when you turn that close up of Unit 08s face upside down, does anybody seem to see that there are glowing eyes?

[]:             Quote Post by CATO » Sat Sep 12, 2009 8:18 pm My first thoughts when Eva08 appeared on the preview were: what the hell is thing floating on? a giant neon purple halo? and then for some reason I envisioned it as a godly thing that wouldn't move and will be there just for wacky plot and weirdness. Ramblings of my brain. And yeah... Kaworu and Shinji are definitely going to have sex in Quickening. Then in the Finale they fight. That way it'll be more dramatic when one of them dies. Yeah. Yeah....

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Sep 12, 2009 8:23 pm Its kind of a wierd coincidence that both Keel and Unit-06 have a visor. Maybe its somehow connected with him or something. Nothing really elaborate or deep, just noticed the coincidence.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 12, 2009 8:46 pm I still like the idea in terms of true Evangelions that Eva-01 gets messed up enough that Shinji (and Rei?) are given birth to by Eva-08, Yui is core-swapped with Eva-01. That way, there could be some conflict between Eva-06 and 08...but who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Sep 12, 2009 9:03 pm I've never been able to figure out what's with Eva-08's eyes. It has three, maybe four eyes!

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Sep 12, 2009 9:13 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I've never been able to figure out what's with Eva-08's eyes. It has three, maybe four eyes!
